name: Artisanal Sourdough Loaf
description: Slow-fermented for 24 hours with organic stone-ground flour, yielding a thick caramelized crust and airy interior.

name: Classic Butter Croissants
description: Layered with premium French butter for an incredibly light, flaky texture and rich golden-brown finish.

name: Luxurious Raspberry Tart
description: Golden shortbread crust filled with rich vanilla bean pastry cream and piled high with fresh, glossy raspberries.

name: Almond Croissant Deluxe
description: Double-baked croissant filled with rich frangipane (almond cream) and topped with sliced almonds and powder sugar.

name: Rustic Olive & Herb Bread
description: Hearty wheat loaf folded with Greek Kalamata olives, fresh rosemary, thyme, and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

name: Strawberry Custard Tart
description: Classic French sweet pastry crust filled with crème pâtissière and decorated with sweet glazed fresh strawberries.
